description: Create network/realtime_apis.cpp - Real-time data module with free APIs for time, weather, currency, news, and geolocation
steps: Create network/realtime_apis.cpp with MKRealtimeAPIs class using libcurl pattern from http.cpp
Implement getWeather(city) using open-meteo.com (free, no API key)
acceptance_criteria: File compiles without errors as part of make all
Class has constructor logging with [REALTIME] prefix
Uses MKHTTP class for all HTTP operations
verification: Run make all and confirm zero compile errors
findings: Created network/realtime_apis.cpp with MKRealtimeAPIs class providing 5 real-time data functions (getCurrentTime, getWeather, getExchangeRate, getTechNews, getIPGeolocation). Uses MKHTTP for all HTTP requests. All functions return structured data types. Compiles cleanly as part of make all.
